violations.text: Oatmilk and cream were observed held at 51 and 47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were assessed and placed into other refrigeration during time of inspection. Methods to keep coffee creamers at adequate temperature reviewed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of various equipment (interior and exterior) and surrounding areas have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025
2nd restroom does not have hot water available at handsink. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025
